full_text:
Bian Hong 邊鴻
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bian Hong (邊鴻)was born in Danyang. Part of Sun Yi’s escort, he assassinated his master after dusk. Executed by his co-conspirators. Bian Hong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Bian Hong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
